# edge corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Cloudflare / Fastly ===
# expect: Cloudflare Origin CA Key
# expect: Fastly API Token
v1.0-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
Fastly-Key: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# === Bunny / Netlify / Deno / NS1 ===
# expect: Bunny.net API Key
# expect: Netlify Personal Access Token
# expect: Deno Deploy Token
# expect: NS1 API Key
AccessKey: 0123abcd-4567-89ab-cdef-0123456789ab
nfp_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
ddp_aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
X-NSONE-Key: aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# === Shopify ===
# expect: Shopify Access Token
# expect: Shopify Custom App Access Token
# expect: Shopify Private App Token
# expect: Shopify Shared Secret
shpat_0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
shpca_0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
shppa_0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
shpss_0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef

# === Deno Deploy ddw_ variant (Block 3b) ===
# expect: Deno Deploy Token
ddw_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Apple ASC / Cloudinary / RevenueCat (Block 3c) ===
# expect: Apple App Store Connect Key File
# expect: Cloudinary URL
# expect: RevenueCat Secret Key
AuthKey_ABCDE12345.p8
cloudinary://123456789012345:AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA@mycloud
sk_appl_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
